episode.title: MTG  Fast Finance Ep 506: Marvel Heroes Previews
episode.description:
James and Cliff drop knowledge on all the lastest in #mtgfinance, including fast movers, cards to watch, meta changes and the results from the World Championships. Then they get their capes wet with Marvel Heroes previews from the forthcoming blockbuster summer 2026 set.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
